headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headings. Use font-black for top-level impact, font-normal for section headers.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, descriptions, and UI labels. Clear, technical, legible.

monospace.usage: Use for schema mapping fields, code snippets, IDs, and data preview cells.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for main cards/panels. Internal paddings around borders must prevent text collision.
layout.dashboard_grid: Grid Borders ('Technical' look). Use border-collapse logic for heavy data views. Main app layout: Side navigation (w-64) + Top Header (h-16) + Main Content Area.
layout.cards: Flat background, 1px solid subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-active.
layout.panels: Use Neumorphism ('Tactile') for small actionable widgets, but mix soft shadows with a sharp 1px border. High contrast text only.
layout.mapping_interface: Center canvas for visual schema mapping. Progressive disclosure for advanced fields. Use modular panels/cards for steps.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-md. High contrast. Primary: solid black. Secondary: outline with solid border. Use data-testid on all.
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized to look crisp. 1px solid border. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-accent-blue.
components.tables: Dense. border-b on rows. Use monospace font for IDs and data values. Sticky headers with backdrop-blur.
components.modals_dialogs: Use Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]) for an optical clarity effect.
components.tabs: Override default Shadcn h-9 to h-auto. Minimalist underline or solid pill styles.
components.toast: Use Sonner. High contrast borders based on status.

icons.style: duotone or regular, technical and dense.

motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out. Do not use 'transition: all' globally, target specific properties like 'transition-colors' or 'transition-transform'.
motion.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly change background and text color.
motion.data_loading: Use Skeleton loaders (Shadcn) with a subtle pulse. Avoid spinners for main content areas.

images.description: Black and white abstract geometric wall, perfect for the login/register screen background to give a structural, technical feel.
Minimalist tech logo placeholder for data sources.

media.rules: Never use placeholder URLs like via.placeholder.com. Ensure images have max-h constraints where appropriate.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Use text shadow over images if needed.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:outline-none.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='run-migration-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required icon library: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Build the dashboard layout with a persistent sidebar and top navigation.
Create a robust Data Source Connection Wizard using clear, modular steps.
Develop the Schema Mapping Engine using a drag-and-drop or visual dropdown interface, applying JetBrains Mono for data fields.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all major headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Prioritize data density and clarity. Use borders to separate table cells and panel areas rather than soft shadows.
Ensure all Shadcn components (like dialogs, select, datepicker) are integrated properly rather than using raw HTML equivalents.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, forms, input fields, and key layout elements.
